query.text:
if dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$CheckSQLInjection(@stt_rec) = 0 return &GLTranReportSql; else begin declare @m_ma_nt0 varchar(10), @key varchar(128) declare @ma_tt nvarchar(16), @so_tt nvarchar(255), @so_tt2 nvarchar(255), @ngay_tt nvarchar(255), @ngay_tt2 nvarchar(255), @ten_bc nvarchar(255), @ten_bc2 nvarchar(255) select @m_ma_nt0 = val from options where name = N'm_ma_nt0' select @ma_tt = rtrim(ltrim(val)) from options where name='r_cdkt' select @so_tt=so_tt, @so_tt2 = so_tt2, @ngay_tt = ngay_tt, @ngay_tt2 = ngay_tt2 from report1 where ma_tt=@ma_tt select @ten_bc = ten_bc, @ten_bc2=ten_bc2 from report2 where ma_tt=@ma_tt and sysid='CDTran'
select rtrim(a.ong_ba) as ong_ba,rtrim(b.ten_kh) as ten_kh ,a.ma_kh as ma_kh,rtrim(b.ten_kh2) as ten_kh2, a.dia_chi, a.dien_giai, a.t_tt, a.t_tt_nt, a.ma_nt, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(@m_ma_nt0, a.t_tt, @@language) as t_tt_in_word, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(a.ma_nt, a.t_tt_nt, @@language) as t_tt_nt_in_word, a.so_ct_goc as so_ct_goc, a.dien_giai_ct_goc, a.ma_nk, a.so_ct, a.tk, a.ty_gia, replace(str(day(ngay_ct),2),' ','0') ngay, replace(str(month(ngay_ct),2),' ','0') thang, str(year(ngay_ct),4) nam, stt_rec, @so_tt as so_tt, @so_tt2 as so_tt2, @ngay_tt as ngay_tt, @ngay_tt2 as ngay_tt2, @ten_bc as ten_bc, @ten_bc2 as ten_bc2 from @@prime$partition$current a with(nolock) left join dmkh b with(nolock) on a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh where stt_rec = @stt_rec
select @key = 'a.stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + '''' exec pr_PrintCDTran2 @@language, @key, 'd51$$partition$current', 'r30$$partition$current' end

header.v: Họ và tên người nhận tiền:
Đã nhận đủ số tiền (viết bằng chữ):
